# Chase Sapphire Preferred

## 🔄 Transfer Program

- Program: Ultimate Rewards
- Direction: outbound only

## 🤝 Transfer Partners

1. Hyatt — 1:1, confirmed
2. United — 1:1, confirmed
3. Southwest — 1:1, confirmed
4. British Airways — 1:1, confirmed
5. Air France/KLM — 1:1, confirmed
6. Virgin Atlantic — 1:1, confirmed
7. Singapore Airlines — 1:1, confirmed
8. Emirates — 1:1, confirmed
9. Iberia — 1:1, confirmed
10. Aer Lingus — 1:1, confirmed
11. JetBlue — 1:1, confirmed
12. IHG — 1:1, confirmed
13. Marriott — 1:1, confirmed
14. Choice — 1:2, confirmed

## ⚠️ Transfer Caveats

- Most transfers complete near-instantly, but some partners may take 1-2 business days
- Transfers are one-way and non-reversible
- Minimum transfer: 1,000 points

- Fixture only. Not live card data.
